/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Application/TSOR001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Bridge/TSBR002A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Format/TSAB001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Format/TSLY001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Format/TSMF001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Format/TSMX001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Format/TSSL001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Mcp/TSMC001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Protocol/TSOC001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/RealTime/TSLF001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/Session/TSSM001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Test.Infrastructure.dir/Sunny.Infrastructure/TSIG001A.cpp.o -o Sunny.Test.Infrastructure  ../Sunny.Core/libSunny.Core.a ../Sunny.Render/libSunny.Render.a ../Sunny.Infrastructure/libSunny.Infrastructure.a ../../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a ../Sunny.Render/libSunny.Render.a ../Sunny.Core/libSunny.Core.a ../../_deps/pugixml-build/libpugixml.a ../../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
